SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

Class ReliefScenario

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.ReliefScenario
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class ReliefScenario extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable description of a single credible overpressure relief scenario for a protected item.

A relief scenario is one row of the API STD 521 section 4.4 / TR3001 section 4.7-4.8 cause table: it records the overpressure cause, the calculated required relief rate, the relieving-fluid properties needed to size a pressure relief device, the relieving phase, whether the rate was determined dynamically (TR3001 SR-26565), the governing standard reference and any assumptions.

Scenarios are created with the ReliefScenario.Builder. The credible flag allows a double-jeopardy filter (TR3001 section 4.2) to exclude a scenario from the governing-case selection without discarding it from the documented set.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    Gets the list of assumptions recorded for this scenario.

    Gets the overpressure cause.

    Gets the relieving-fluid compressibility factor Z.
    double
    getDensityKgPerM3()
    Gets the relieving-fluid density (used for liquid relief volume-flow conversion).
    double

    Gets the inlet gas density for two-phase relief sizing.
    double

    Gets the inlet gas (vapour) mass fraction for two-phase relief sizing.
    double
    getLatentHeatJPerKg()
    Gets the latent heat of vaporization used for fire and flashing two-phase relief.
    double

    Gets the inlet liquid density for two-phase relief sizing.
    double
    getLiquidHeatCapacityJPerKgK()
    Gets the liquid heat capacity used for the two-phase omega method.
    double
    getMolarMassKgPerMol()
    Gets the relieving-fluid molar mass.

    Gets the scenario name.

    Gets the relieving phase.
    double

    Gets the required relief rate in kg/hr.

    Gets the required relief rate.
    double

    Gets the relieving temperature.
    double

    Gets the governing standard reference (TR3001 SR-clause and/or API STD 521 section).
    double

    Gets the relieving-liquid dynamic viscosity (used for the API 520 liquid viscosity correction).

    Indicates whether the scenario is credible and eligible for governing-case selection.
    boolean

    Indicates whether the relief rate was determined by dynamic simulation (TR3001 SR-26565).

    Returns a copy of this scenario with the credible flag set to the supplied value.

    • ReliefScenario

      private ReliefScenario(ReliefScenario.Builder builder)
      Creates an immutable relief scenario from a builder.

      builder - the populated builder; not null

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Gets the scenario name.
      Returns:
      the scenario name

    • getCause

      public ReliefCause getCause()
      Gets the overpressure cause.
      Returns:
      the relief cause

    • getPhase

      public ReliefPhase getPhase()
      Gets the relieving phase.
      Returns:
      the relief phase

    • getReliefRateKgPerS

      public double getReliefRateKgPerS()
      Gets the required relief rate.
      Returns:
      the relief rate in kg/s

    • getReliefRateKgPerHr

      public double getReliefRateKgPerHr()
      Gets the required relief rate in kg/hr.
      Returns:
      the relief rate in kg/hr

    • getReliefTemperatureK

      public double getReliefTemperatureK()
      Gets the relieving temperature.
      Returns:
      the relieving temperature in K

    • getMolarMassKgPerMol

      public double getMolarMassKgPerMol()
      Gets the relieving-fluid molar mass.
      Returns:
      the molar mass in kg/mol

    • getCompressibility

      public double getCompressibility()
      Gets the relieving-fluid compressibility factor Z.
      Returns:
      the compressibility factor (dimensionless)

    • getSpecificHeatRatio

      public double getSpecificHeatRatio()
      Gets the relieving-fluid specific-heat ratio Cp/Cv.
      Returns:
      the specific-heat ratio (dimensionless)

    • getDensityKgPerM3

      public double getDensityKgPerM3()
      Gets the relieving-fluid density (used for liquid relief volume-flow conversion).
      Returns:
      the density in kg/m3, or NaN if not set

    • getViscosityPaS

      public double getViscosityPaS()
      Gets the relieving-liquid dynamic viscosity (used for the API 520 liquid viscosity correction).
      Returns:
      the viscosity in Pa*s, or NaN if not set

    • getGasMassFraction

      public double getGasMassFraction()
      Gets the inlet gas (vapour) mass fraction for two-phase relief sizing.
      Returns:
      the gas mass fraction (0-1), or NaN if not set

    • getGasDensityKgPerM3

      public double getGasDensityKgPerM3()
      Gets the inlet gas density for two-phase relief sizing.
      Returns:
      the gas density in kg/m3, or NaN if not set

    • getLiquidDensityKgPerM3

      public double getLiquidDensityKgPerM3()
      Gets the inlet liquid density for two-phase relief sizing.
      Returns:
      the liquid density in kg/m3, or NaN if not set

    • getLatentHeatJPerKg

      public double getLatentHeatJPerKg()
      Gets the latent heat of vaporization used for fire and flashing two-phase relief.
      Returns:
      the latent heat in J/kg, or NaN if not set

    • getLiquidHeatCapacityJPerKgK

      public double getLiquidHeatCapacityJPerKgK()
      Gets the liquid heat capacity used for the two-phase omega method.
      Returns:
      the liquid heat capacity in J/(kg*K), or NaN if not set

    • isDynamicallyDetermined

      public boolean isDynamicallyDetermined()
      Indicates whether the relief rate was determined by dynamic simulation (TR3001 SR-26565).
      Returns:
      true if dynamically determined, false if from a steady-state estimate

    • isCredible

      public boolean isCredible()
      Indicates whether the scenario is credible and eligible for governing-case selection.
      Returns:
      true if credible, false if excluded (for example by a double-jeopardy filter)

    • getStandardReference

      public String getStandardReference()
      Gets the governing standard reference (TR3001 SR-clause and/or API STD 521 section).
      Returns:
      the standard reference string

    • getAssumptions

      public List<String> getAssumptions()
      Gets the list of assumptions recorded for this scenario.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of assumption strings

    • withCredible

      public ReliefScenario withCredible(boolean newCredible)
      Returns a copy of this scenario with the credible flag set to the supplied value. Used by a double-jeopardy filter to mark a scenario non-credible without mutating the original.
      Parameters:
      newCredible - the credibility flag for the returned scenario
      Returns:
      a copy of this scenario with the updated credibility flag
